allow: Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'echo "node: $\(node -v 2>/dev/null || echo no\)"; echo "npm: $\(npm -v 2>/dev/null || echo no\)"; echo "ng: $\(ng version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo no\)"')

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'echo "pnpm: $\(pnpm -v 2>/dev/null || echo NO\)"; echo "node: $\(node -v\)"; echo "--- frontend dir ---"; ls -la /home/ema/personal-repos/omni-red/frontend 2>/dev/null || echo "\(no existe frontend aún\)"; echo "--- backend dir ---"; ls -R /home/ema/personal-repos/omni-red/backend 2>/dev/null')

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'corepack enable 2>&1; corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.0 --activate 2>&1; echo "---"; echo "pnpm: $\(pnpm -v 2>/dev/null || echo STILL-NO\)"')
